In this 60-minute session, you’ll explore rhythm, musicality, and full-body movement through accessible choreography and playful combinations. Open to all levels, the class offers options and variations so you can move at your own pace—whether you’re new to dance or looking to deepen your groove. Expect a supportive atmosphere, a good sweat, and plenty of space to connect with the music, your body, and the joy of movement. No partner needed. Come as you are, leave energised and inspired.

sessions.title: ProDance class with Hannah Thomas
sessions.details: This class will explore all things floorwork; from the gooey, melty improvisations to the highly exhilarating, ‘let the rhythm of the music take you for a ride’ phrase work. Hannah facilitates a friendly space for participants to explore with ease and encourages this through the use of music and individual feedback where possible. Expect a bubbly class, a spicy playlist and a lot of adrenaline.

sessions.title: YIN  WITH MYOFASCIAL RELEASE
sessions.details: Yin Myofascial Release (Yin MFR) is a slow, nourishing practice that combines long-held Yin poses with massage balls to gently melt away deep tension in the body. We’ll settle into passive stretches for a few minutes at a time, using props to apply steady, mindful pressure to areas like the hips, back, shoulders and feet. This helps release tight fascia, improve mobility, ease soreness and leave you feeling more spacious and hydrated from the inside out. It’s not about pushing, it’s about softening. As the body unwinds, the nervous system shifts into “rest and digest” mode, helping you feel grounded, calm and deeply relaxed. Suitable for most levels, this class is a beautiful way to care for your body, move more freely, and give yourself the reset you didn’t know you needed.

sessions.title: ProDance class with Hannah Thomas
sessions.details: This class will explore all things floorwork; from the gooey, melty improvisations to the highly exhilarating, ‘let the rhythm of the music take you for a ride’ phrase work. Hannah facilitates a friendly space for participants to explore with ease and encourages this through the use of music and individual feedback where possible. Expect a bubbly class, a spicy playlist and a lot of adrenaline.

sessions.title: ROCKET
sessions.details: Rocket is deeply rooted in Ashtanga. It is a series of standing, balancing and inverted postures all linked by vinyasas (movement flows), incorporating basic poses with challenging arm balances, inversions and back bends Inversions are lot of fun, but they also prove to be some of the most challenging postures. Some of the upside down postures are designed to energise us, others are designed to calm us down. No matter if you are a newbie or an old hat to inversions this class will be fun, will get you sweating and see the world from another perspective -upside down.

sessions.title: LATIN-FUSION DANCE
sessions.details: A joyful, high-energy class blending Latin dance styles with contemporary movement and expressive flow. In this 60-minute session, you’ll explore rhythm, musicality, and full-body movement through accessible choreography and playful combinations. Open to all levels, the class offers options and variations so you can move at your own pace—whether you’re new to dance or looking to deepen your groove. Expect a supportive atmosphere, a good sweat, and plenty of space to connect with the music, your body, and the joy of movement. No partner needed. Come as you are, leave energised and inspired.

sessions.title: YIN  WITH MYOFASCIAL RELEASE
sessions.details: Yin Myofascial Release (Yin MFR) is a slow, nourishing practice that combines long-held Yin poses with massage balls to gently melt away deep tension in the body. We’ll settle into passive stretches for a few minutes at a time, using props to apply steady, mindful pressure to areas like the hips, back, shoulders and feet. As the body unwinds, the nervous system shifts into “rest and digest” mode, helping you feel grounded, calm and deeply relaxed. Suitable for most levels, this class is a beautiful way to care for your body, move more freely, and give yourself the reset you didn’t know you needed.

This helps release tight fascia, improve mobility, ease soreness and leave you feeling more spacious and hydrated from the inside out. It’s not about pushing, it’s about softening. As the body unwinds, the nervous system shifts into “rest and digest” mode, helping you feel grounded, calm and deeply relaxed. Suitable for most levels, this class is a beautiful way to care for your body, move more freely, and give yourself the reset you didn’t know you needed.

sessions.title: ROCKET
sessions.details: Rocket is deeply rooted in Ashtanga. It is a series of standing, balancing and inverted postures all linked by vinyasas (movement flows), incorporating basic poses with challenging arm balances, inversions and back bends Inversions are lot of fun, but they also prove to be some of the most challenging postures. Some of the upside down postures are designed to energise us, others are designed to calm us down. No matter if you are a newbie or an old hat to inversions this class will be fun, will get you sweating and see the world from another perspective -upside down.

sessions.title: LATIN-FUSION DANCE
sessions.details: A joyful, high-energy class blending Latin dance styles with contemporary movement and expressive flow. In this 60-minute session, you’ll explore rhythm, musicality, and full-body movement through accessible choreography and playful combinations. Open to all levels, the class offers options and variations so you can move at your own pace—whether you’re new to dance or looking to deepen your groove. Expect a supportive atmosphere, a good sweat, and plenty of space to connect with the music, your body, and the joy of movement. No partner needed. Come as you are, leave energised and inspired.

sessions.title: Ballet - Classical Ballet - Dmitri Gruzdev - GEN - £13
sessions.details: Instructor: Dmitri Gruzdev | Level: General | Room: Studio 2 | Location: Danceworks | Classes are bookable 7 days in advance. Concessions and packages are available.Please note if you have to cancel your booking for any reason, our cancellation policy is 24 hours for open classes , 48 hours for masterclasses . For our terms and conditions click here.If you have any questions or technical issues call 020 7629 6183 or email membership@danceworks.com.CLASS DESCRIPTIONThe classes are geared to help dancers maintain and further their technique, strengthen the core centre, work on their musicality and speed while at the same time investigate and explore deeper level of their artistry. The class is based on the Russian ballet style, teaching dance, musicality, and technique in a fun and engaging manner.This class is not suited for absolute beginners.Minimum age: 14 (Younger with exception, contact reception )

sessions.title: Ballet - Classical Ballet - Tiffany Hedman - ADV/PRO - £12
sessions.details: Instructor: Richard Bermange (substitute) | Level: Advanced/Prof | Room: Studio 2 | Location: Danceworks | Classes are bookable 7 days in advance. Concessions and packages are available.Please note if you have to cancel your booking for any reason, our cancellation policy is 24 hours for open classes, 48 hours for masterclasses. For our terms and conditions click here.If you have any questions or technical issues call 020 7629 6183 or emailmembership@danceworks.com. BIOBorn and raised in California, Tiffany began training at the San Francisco Ballet School at the age of 12. Her first professional engagement was with Boston Ballet II, followed by four seasons with Miami City Ballet. She then returned to Boston Ballet, where she was promoted to the rank of soloist. In 2014, Tiffany joined English National Ballet, also as a soloist, and remained with the company for ten and a half years—bringing her total professional career to an impressive 24 years.CLASS DESCRIPTIONThe class is geared for professionals, pre professionals and advanced students over 14 years of age. It is important to get a sense of what professional company class is like, so I feel it’s important to bring that atmosphere into the studio. It is relatively simple for the mind to retain, so we can focus on honing our skills and warming up our body’s in the proper way. I promote a positive and safe environment that encourages you reach your goals.

sessions.title: Fitness - Posture Power - Christina Mittelmaier - ALL - £12
sessions.details: Instructor: Christina Mittelmaier | Level: All Levels | Room: Studio 1 | Location: Danceworks | Classes are bookable 7 days in advance. Concessions and packages are available.Please note if you have to cancel your booking for any reason, our cancellation policy is 24 hours for open classes , 48 hours for masterclasses . For our terms and conditions click here.If you have any questions or technical issues call 020 7629 6183 or email membership@danceworks.com. CLASS DESCRIPTION: Do you want to limit your injury risk, while also building strength to become a better dancer? This fitness class will help you substantially improve your posture and correct any issues relating to your body alignment. It is very easy to create bad habits in ballet, so changing these habits often requires retraining muscle memory. Christina's Posture Power with PBT elements class will not only help you build up more strength and flexibility, but will also help you train the muscle memory required for automatically performing movements the right way. This class will be accompanied by music. With her experience as a coach, ballet teacher and approved PBT instructor, Christina has put together a class that will help you limit your injury risk and become a stronger and better dancer. Posture Power with PBT elements is a general level class and therefore suitable for those, who either wish to improve their ballet technique or simply improve their fitness level. It is also a perfect preparation for her 11:30 Int/Adv ballet class which takes place right after her Posture Power with PBT elements class. Progressing Ballet Technique (PBT) is an innovative programme which was developed by Marie Walton- Mahon in order to help dancers and students improve their technique. The programme includes carefully designed exercises focusing on training muscle memory and improving core strength, weight placement and alignment of the body. Minimum age: 14

sessions.title: Ballet - Classical Ballet - Inga George - INT - £12
sessions.details: Instructor: Inga George | Level: Intermediate | Room: Studio 2 | Location: Danceworks | Classes are bookable 7 days in advance. Concessions and packages are available.Please note if you have to cancel your booking for any reason, our cancellation policy is 24 hours for open classes , 48 hours for masterclasses . For our terms and conditions click here.If you have any questions or technical issues call 020 7629 6183 or email membership@danceworks.com.CLASS DESCRIPTION A moving class created for students with previous ballet experience and familiarity with ballet terminology. Progress through barre and center work designed to increase strength, flexibility, and technique and dance through graceful combinations. Special attention to epaulement (turning of the shoulders and upper body), correct training of the arms (port de bras), fluidity, placement, coordination with the head and all movements and precise coordination of the whole body, working as one unit.Recommended for those with around one year’s worth of knowledge of basic ballet steps or for returning students looking to go back to the basics. Minimum age: 16 (12+ as long as they have prior experience)

sessions.title: Contemporary & Jazz - Floorwork Foundations - Yvonne Rossi - BEG - £12
sessions.details: Instructor: Nadine Muncey (substitute) | Level: Beginner | Room: Studio 2 | Location: Danceworks | Classes are bookable 7 days in advance. Concessions and packages are available.Please note if you have to cancel your booking for any reason, our cancellation policy is 24 hours for open classes, 48 hours for masterclasses. For our terms and conditions click here.If you have any questions or technical issues call 020 7629 6183 or email membership@danceworks.com. CLASS DESCRIPTIONFloorwork Foundations is a class that will introduce the essential principles of Contemporary Floorwork technique. We will take the time to break down and learn the floorwork fundamentals in order for you to gain more confidence, flow and fluidity on and off the floor.The class will offer a warm up, an initial sequence where you will have the chance to study the key elements of floorwork, some crossings to learn how to roll and slide across the space and a choreography at the end of the class. These sessions are suitable for beginners/improvers who already have some experience in floorwork and/or contemporary dance. We will work mostly on the floor so it is highly recommended to wear long trousers, long sleeve t-shirt and socks.

sessions.title: Contemporary & Jazz - Contemporary - Jana Bednarova - INT/ADV - £13
sessions.details: Instructor: Jana Bednarova | Level: Interm/Advanced | Room: Studio 2 | Location: Danceworks | Classes are bookable 7 days in advance. Concessions and packages are available. Please note if you have to cancel your booking for any reason, our cancellation policy is 24 hours for open classes, 48 hours for masterclasses. For our terms and conditions click here. If you have any questions or technical issues call 020 7629 6183 or emailmembership@danceworks.com. Class Description Jana’s contemporary blends the foundations and techniques of contemporary dance, flow and floorwork, and physical theatre. Elements of smooth movement and power technique, and how to use them combined. Using detailed musicality to drive the intention behind the movement. You will work on improvisation in a safe environment and learn how to use different parts of your body to initiate and lead a movement, such as exploring how to express through dance. This class is NOT suitable for absolute beginners

sessions.title: Tap & Musical Theatre - Musical Theatre - Phil Comley - BEG/GEN - £14
sessions.details: Instructor: Philip Comley | Level: Beginner/General | Room: Studio 4 | Location: Danceworks | Classes are bookable 7 days in advance. Concessions and packages are available.Please note if you have to cancel your booking for any reason, our cancellation policy is 24 hours for open classes , 48 hours for masterclasses . For our terms and conditions click here.If you have any questions or technical issues call 020 7629 6183 or email membership@danceworks.com. CLASS DESCRIPTIONA fun and lively Musical Theatre Jazz class. We start with a technical warm up to prepare the body. This includes joint mobilisation, plies, tendus, adage, stretching, floor work and abdominal strengthening. We then move across the floor with kicks, turns and leaps. The final part of the class is dedicated to learning and dancing the combination. This is usually a track from a musical or inspired by musical theatre technique. All levels are welcome. This is a very safe class for people who would like to extend their dance knowledge in a supportive and encouraging environment. Minimum age: 14 (Younger as long as they have prior experience)

sessions.title: World Dance - Bachata Lady Style - Alexa Khammud - ALL - £12
sessions.details: Instructor: Anastasiia Gorodetskaya (substitute) | Level: All Levels | Room: Studio 5 | Location: Danceworks | Classes are bookable 7 days in advance. Concessions and packages are available.Please note if you have to cancel your booking for any reason, our cancellation policy is 24 hours for open classes , 48 hours for masterclasses . For our terms and conditions click here.If you have any questions or technical issues call 020 7629 6183 or email membership@danceworks.com. CLASS DESCRIPTION Originating from the Dominican Republic, Bachata Lady Style showcases smooth, fluid movements, intricate footwork, and sensual hip motions, allowing dancers to express their femininity and grace on the dance floor. This style is typically performed to the same songs as traditional Bachata, but with a focus on individual expression and creativity. It requires good body control, technique, and a strong sense of rhythm and form. Bachata Lady Style is a captivating way for anyone to explore the beauty of Bachata as a solo dancer, and it offers a refreshing alternative for those looking to add a new dimension to their dance repertoire. Minimum age: 16

sessions.title: Street & Commercial - Hip-Hop/Commercial - Ezzy Nzewi - BEG/GEN - £13
sessions.details: Instructor: Ezzy Nzewi | Level: Beginner/General | Room: Studio 6 | Location: Danceworks | Classes are bookable 7 days in advance. Concessions and packages are available.Please note if you have to cancel your booking for any reason, our cancellation policy is 24 hours for open classes , 48 hours for masterclasses . For our terms and conditions click here.If you have any questions or technical issues call 020 7629 6183 or email membership@danceworks.com. CLASS DESCRIPTIONHip Hop / Commercial is an energetic class that blends the foundations of Hip-Hop with the polished, performance-driven style seen in music videos, commercials, and live performances.Each class includes a warm-up to build strength and flexibility, drills to refine technique, and a fun routine that focuses on expanding the abilities of each student in areas such as musicality, performance & movement quality.Whether you’re looking to improve your freestyle, master trending moves, or prepare for the stage, this class is perfect for dancers who want to train hard and have fun while doing it!Minimum age: 16This class is not suitable for absolute beginners

sessions.title: Contemporary & Jazz - Sensual Jazz - Jenny Stone - IMP - £14
sessions.details: Instructor: Tatiana Ferreira (substitute) | Level: Improver | Room: Studio 1 | Location: Danceworks | Classes are bookable 7 days in advance. Concessions and packages are available.Please note if you have to cancel your booking for any reason, our cancellation policy is 24 hours for open classes, 48 hours for masterclasses. For our terms and conditions click here.If you have any questions or technical issues call 020 7629 6183 or email membership@danceworks.com. Class Description A dance class blending sensuality, fluidity, and technique, inspired by jazz and the heels universe… without heels.Sensual Jazz is a pedagogical approach to Jenny’s style. Her heels choreographies are strongly influenced by jazz, and this class allows dancers to explore the technical foundations on flat feet, in order to better understand movement and improve overall quality.

sessions.title: Ballet - Ballet for Absolute Beginners - Olga Sabadoch - BEG - £14
sessions.details: Instructor: Olga Sabadoch | Level: Beginner | Room: Studio 3 | Location: Danceworks | Classes are bookable 7 days in advance. Concessions and packages are available.Please note if you have to cancel your booking for any reason, our cancellation policy is 24 hours for open classes , 48 hours for masterclasses . For our terms and conditions click here.If you have any questions or technical issues call 020 7629 6183 or email membership@danceworks.com. CLASS DESCRIPTION In Olga’s Absolute Beginners class, you study the fundamentals of classical ballet, the movements that represent the basis of the art form – from very simple steps to the more exciting ones. Olga explains principles of correct body placement, stresses importance of the arms positioning and of the attention to musicality. Olga provides detailed explanation of the ballet terminology and of the proper ways of executing of each step. Minimum age: 14

sessions.title: Street & Commercial - Heels Choreography - Jenny Stone - GEN - £14
sessions.details: Instructor: Tatiana Ferreira (substitute) | Level: General | Room: Studio 1 | Location: Danceworks | Classes are bookable 7 days in advance. Concessions and packages are available.Please note if you have to cancel your booking for any reason, our cancellation policy is 24 hours for open classes, 48 hours for masterclasses. For our terms and conditions click here.If you have any questions or technical issues call 020 7629 6183 or email membership@danceworks.com. CLASS DESCRIPTIONParisienne Touch will help you to discover the modern woman inside of you, increasing your self-confidence, developing your sense of femininity and inner boldness. For anyone aged 16 and over you will have fun learning to catwalk with attitude, strike stunning poses and perform feminine and elegant dance routines. Each week, a range of exercises will allow you to explore a hidden part of yourself and to grow in confidence, class after class. This class is not suited for beginners. Minimum age: 16 ( 8+ with parents consent)

sessions.title: Street & Commercial - Female Street Dance for Absolute Beginners - Sarah Jane - £13
sessions.details: Instructor: Sarah Jane | Level: Beginner | Room: Studio 2 | Location: Danceworks | Classes are bookable 7 days in advance. Concessions and packages are available.Please note if you have to cancel your booking for any reason, our cancellation policy is 24 hours for open classes , 48 hours for masterclasses . For our terms and conditions click here.If you have any questions or technical issues call 020 7629 6183 or email membership@danceworks.com. CLASS DESCRIPTIONFemale street dance is for women from all walks of life wanting to learn and try new moves in a fun non judgmental environment.Each class will consist of a thorough warm up, learning dance moves which can be applied in social settings and lastly learning a choreographed routine. The theme of this class is to boost confidence, have endless fun and learn moves that you can bust out in the club if you so wish! Please come ready to sweat in comfortable clothing and trainers. Absolute beginner – focus is placed on learning foundation steps at a slower pace, preparing you for the beginner level class.

sessions.title: Street & Commercial - Kpop - Siyu Lu - BEG - £12
sessions.details: Instructor: Siyu Lu | Level: Beginner | Room: Studio 9 | Location: Danceworks | Classes are bookable 7 days in advance. Concessions and packages are available.Please note if you have to cancel your booking for any reason, our cancellation policy is 24 hours for open classes , 48 hours for masterclasses . For our terms and conditions click here.If you have any questions or technical issues call 020 7629 6183 or email membership@danceworks.com. CLASS DESCRIPTION Get ready to step into the world of K-pop! In this high-energy weekly class, we’ll learn choreography from the latest or popular girl group releases, breaking down the moves step-by-step to make them accessible for beginners while still offering a fun challenge for all levels. Whether you’re a seasoned dancer or just starting out, this class is a welcoming space to explore your love for K-pop, improve your dance technique, and boost your confidence. Come dance, sweat, and slay like your favorite idols! No experience needed — just bring your energy and excitement!

sessions.title: Contemporary & Jazz - Hip Hop Contemporary Fusion - Yse Beal - BEG - £12
sessions.details: Instructor: Anna Watanne (substitute) | Level: Beginner | Room: Studio 8 | Location: Danceworks | Classes are bookable 7 days in advance. Concessions and packages are available.Please note if you have to cancel your booking for any reason, our cancellation policy is 24 hours for open classes , 48 hours for masterclasses . For our terms and conditions click here.If you have any questions or technical issues call 020 7629 6183 or email membership@danceworks.com. CLASS DESCRIPTION Discover how to connect with your body and move with control through fluid, continuous motion. In my classes, I aim to create a safe and welcoming space where you can explore movement freely and without judgment. Blending contemporary flow with hip hop influences and groove, we’ll engage the whole body, tuning into rhythm, texture, and dynamics to deepen your connection to musicality. With fluidity, groove, and expression at the heart of it, this class is open to your own interpretation, inviting you to find your unique flow and artistry within the music. Minimum age: 16

sessions.title: World Dance - LA Salsa - Edgars Menikis - BEG - £13
sessions.details: Instructor: Edgars Menikis | Level: Beginner | Room: Studio 5 | Location: Danceworks | Classes are bookable 7 days in advance. Concessions and packages are available.Please note if you have to cancel your booking for any reason, our cancellation policy is 24 hours for open classes , 48 hours for masterclasses . For our terms and conditions click here.If you have any questions or technical issues call 020 7629 6183 or email membership@danceworks.com. CLASS DESCRIPTIONLA-style salsa is danced in a line where dancers break on the first beat of the music (on 1) rather than on 2. Many dancers find this timing more intuitive. LA-style is a fantastic starting point for those with or without prior dancing experience.The narrow path aspect of LA style makes it easy to keep track of where you are in and among all of those spins and turns you will very quickly be mastering. Minimum age: 16

sessions.title: World Dance - Fusion Choreography - Vaneza Salgado - ALL - £12
sessions.details: Instructor: Vaneza Salgado | Level: All Levels | Room: Studio 5 | Location: Danceworks | Classes are bookable 7 days in advance. Concessions and packages are available.Please note if you have to cancel your booking for any reason, our cancellation policy is 24 hours for open classes , 48 hours for masterclasses . For our terms and conditions click here.If you have any questions or technical issues call 020 7629 6183 or email membership@danceworks.com.CLASS DESCRIPTIONFusion Choreography is high energy choreography for dancers at all levels. Involves musicality, groove, fluidity and sharpness of the body. The Choreography carries influences of Commercial and afro dance. You can expect a whole lot of fun, groove and vibe. The class will begin with a warm up, breaking down core movements of the choreography and go straight into Sections of the choreography. At the end of class, we will encourage and support each other with the chance to Perform! You will walk out of class feeling more confident in yourself.” I create a dance environment where it is a safe space and where my studetns feel supported. Especially during class my aim is for my students to grow their technique, execution of movement, self love, enjoyment, musicality and muscle memory.” – Vaneza Minimum age: 16 This class is not suitable for absolute beginners

sessions.title: World Dance - Beginners Bhangra - Jas Aulakh - BEG - £13
sessions.details: Instructor: Jas Aulakh | Level: Beginner | Room: Studio 3 | Location: Danceworks | Classes are bookable 7 days in advance. Concessions and packages are available.Please note if you have to cancel your booking for any reason, our cancellation policy is 24 hours for open classes , 48 hours for masterclasses . For our terms and conditions click here.If you have any questions or technical issues call 020 7629 6183 or email membership@danceworks.com. Bhangra is a vibrant folk dance that originates from the farming fields of Punjab, North India, and is now celebrated worldwide as a dance of joy and expression. This class is designed especially for complete beginners or anyone wanting to build a stronger foundation in Bhangra technique.

sessions.title: Street & Commercial - Shuffling - Chiara Gala - BEG - £12
sessions.details: Instructor: Chiara Gala | Level: Beginner | Room: Studio 8 | Location: Danceworks | Classes are bookable 7 days in advance. Concessions and packages are available.Please note if you have to cancel your booking for any reason, our cancellation policy is 24 hours for open classes , 48 hours for masterclasses . For our terms and conditions click here.If you have any questions or technical issues call 020 7629 6183 or email membership@danceworks.com. Learn shuffle foundations, flow elements, and fun grooves. You’ll practice combos and some choreographies step by step, getting more confident in the style and exploring how to merge the steps together.

Always wanted to try ballet but didn’t know where to start? Or maybe you danced as a child and want to return to the basics? This class is designed just for you.Absolute Beginners Ballet is a slow-paced, supportive introduction to classical ballet. You’ll learn the essential positions, steps, and techniques, all while developing strength, flexibility, posture, and coordination. No experience is needed—just a willingness to learn and move. Each session includes foundational barre work and simple centre exercises to help you feel confident and graceful, even as a beginner. We keep things light and enjoyable, blending technique with fun, flowing movement. Whether you’re curious about ballet or simply looking for a new way to move your body, this class offers a welcoming space to begin. You’ll improve your posture, balance, coordination and overall strength and flexibility.”

Participants will be part of a safe, positive and supportive environment, where everyone can feel free to learn, explore and discover new ways of moving through different contemporary dance styles. Classes will focus on studying specific movement vocabulary, correct alignment, improving coordination, memory and musicality. We will work with warm up sequences and centre work, some crossings to travel through the space and we will implement some improvisation, choreography and partnering. Dancers will study a fusion of contemporary dance styles, with a main focus on Release and Floorwork and a brief introduction to essential elements of Cunningham and Graham techniques. Creativity, physicality and openness are the key principles for this journey. Minimum age: 14

CLASS DESCRIPTION: Do you want to limit your injury risk, while also building strength to become a better dancer? This fitness class will help you substantially improve your posture and correct any issues relating to your body alignment. It is very easy to create bad habits in ballet, so changing these habits often requires retraining muscle memory. Christina's Posture Power with PBT elements class will not only help you build up more strength and flexibility, but will also help you train the muscle memory required for automatically performing movements the right way. This class will be accompanied by music. With her experience as a coach, ballet teacher and approved PBT instructor, Christina has put together a class that will help you limit your injury risk and become a stronger and better dancer. Posture Power with PBT elements is a general level class and therefore suitable for those, who either wish to improve their ballet technique or simply improve their fitness level. It is also a perfect preparation for her 11:30 Int/Adv ballet class which takes place right after her Posture Power with PBT elements class. Progressing Ballet Technique (PBT) is an innovative programme which was developed by Marie Walton- Mahon in order to help dancers and students improve their technique. The programme includes carefully designed exercises focusing on training muscle memory and improving core strength, weight placement and alignment of the body. Minimum age: 14

sessions.details: Instructor: Nefeli Fotiadi (substitute) | Level: Beginner | Room: Studio 9 | Location: Danceworks | Classes are bookable 7 days in advance. CLASS DESCRIPTION This class will follow the traditional structure of the codified technique, sequencing through a set series of seated floor exercises, standing exercises and across-the-floor sequences. The Graham Technique is an immensely valuable technique to layer on top of any dance training as it emphasises the importance of the usage of the back, as well as accessing the deep core abdominal muscles.Fundamental principles in Graham Technique are the contraction and release, opposition, shift of weight and spirals. Graham dancers believe that it is important that we not simply see ourselves as objects in space when dancing, but that we expand their body, energy and focus so they are amplified enough to fill that space. The class will serve to free up the back, open up the hips and the body. On top, form the dancer to find dynamics, intricacy and articulation of the spine. Minimum age: 16

CLASS DESCRIPTION Alice’s floor barre was developed and taught to her by the world renowned ballet teacher, Madame Maria Fay. It is a system based on and complimenting a classical ballet technique. Contrary to other conditioning and workout programmes the floor barre is designed particularly to serve the needs of a dancer. Vital in helping to correct postural faults, shaping and strengthening the physique, enhancing the flexibility of the body as well as aiding and supporting dancer’s’ technique and stamina. It is extremely satisfying for dancers and students, helping raise confidence in their body awareness and ability. This class is not suited for beginners. Minimum age: 13 (Younger with exception, contact reception )

BIOBorn and raised in California, Tiffany began training at the San Francisco Ballet School at the age of 12. Her first professional engagement was with Boston Ballet II, followed by four seasons with Miami City Ballet. She then returned to Boston Ballet, where she was promoted to the rank of soloist. In 2014, Tiffany joined English National Ballet, also as a soloist, and remained with the company for ten and a half years—bringing her total professional career to an impressive 24 years.CLASS DESCRIPTIONThe class is geared for professionals, pre professionals and advanced students over 14 years of age. It is important to get a sense of what professional company class is like, so I feel it’s important to bring that atmosphere into the studio. It is relatively simple for the mind to retain, so we can focus on honing our skills and warming up our body’s in the proper way. I promote a positive and safe environment that encourages you reach your goals.

CLASS DESCRIPTIONLA-style salsa is danced in a line where dancers break on the first beat of the music (on 1) rather than on 2. Many dancers find this timing more intuitive. LA-style is a fantastic starting point for those with or without prior dancing experience.The narrow path aspect of LA style makes it easy to keep track of where you are in and among all of those spins and turns you will very quickly be mastering. Minimum age: 16 This class is not suitable for beginners.

sessions.title: Contemporary & Jazz - Kpop Fusion - Suyoung Park - BEG - £12
sessions.details: Instructor: Suyoung Park | Level: Beginner | Room: Studio 5 | Location: Danceworks | This class explores Korean pop music through a unique fusion of Korean traditional movement and contemporary dance.Rather than focusing on imitation alone, we take time to understand the lyrics, emotions, and cultural context behind K-pop, allowing movement to grow from meaning.The class is led by Suyoung, who trained in both the Korean commercial dance industry and Korean contemporary dance. Drawing from the directional quality and grounded aesthetics of traditional Korean movement, she re-imagines them in a more modern and expressive way, creating original choreography that feels both rooted and contemporary. This 1-hour beginner class is ideal for: Those fascinated by Korean dramas and the emotional depth of K-popDancers curious about Korean-influenced creative movementAnyone wanting to experience a different approach to contemporary dance through Korean aestheticsNo prior experience is required. Class Structure Warm-up and foundational movementIntroduction to basic steps and movement principlesLearning and exploring choreography Music All music used in class is Korean, including: K-pop (R&B & Pop)Modern Korean popTraditional Korean-inspired musicKorean drama OSTs

For improvers or more advanced dancers, take the time to get back to basics and tune in with your body, whether you want to focus more on your flexibility or technical training, this is the space for you.Classes will be high-energy and, of course, a great time, so bring that water bottle and get ready to move!

There is a joyful and light-hearted atmosphere - newcomers are welcome at any time and they fit in easily to the flow of the class.

Come & connect with your inner child, re discover the joy in creating rhythms, move your gorgeous body & celebrate this unique and special art form with me. This class will be available to stream via ZOOM for any one who can’t attend in person. Follow @movewithbeaux for all weekly class updates.

sessions.title: Improvers Commercial
sessions.details: Ready to take your dancing to the next level? Our Improvers Commercial class is perfect for those looking for a challenge! Expect high-energy combos, industry-style movement, and a focus on musicality, performance, and execution. This class will push your technique, build confidence, and help you bring that star quality to your dancing. If you're comfortable picking up choreography and ready to level up, this one’s for you! | Melly Cardell | 16 yrs and over | Studio 6

sessions.title: Beginners Heels
sessions.details: Beginner heels working on technique & heels foundation with choreography to perform at the end. This class is designed to elevate your skills help build confidence & encourage you to be you, be free, fabulous! | Tarek Khwiss | 18 yrs and over | Studio 6

sessions.title: Beginners Commercial
sessions.details: Discover your natural groove, lines and shapes whilst learning full out choreography to your favourite music. Each week we will explore different styles within commercial keeping it exciting and giving you all the dynamics. Come vibe with me !! | Melly Cardell | 16 yrs and over | Studio 4

sessions.title: Beginners Contemporary
sessions.details: Step into the flow with me in this Beginners Contemporary Class – Together, we'll unravel the basics, polish/teach techniques, and seamlessly flow into captivating routines. It's not just a class; it's a community of dance enthusiasts. Expect a laid-back, fun atmosphere that celebrates individual expression. | George Butler | 16 yrs and over | Studio 4

sessions.title: Birthday Fundraiser for Palestine: Beginner Commercial
sessions.details: HausOf Hurriyah birthday fundraiser for Palestine, raising money for Smoud for Gaza. Beginner Commercial at The Manor LDN.
